data.title: Tesla Bull Says EV Giant's Q1 Delivery Shortfall Is Not Due To Elon Musk's Political Comments And DOGE: 'Republicans Are Likely Thrilled'
data.description: Tesla's delivery shortfall may not be due to Musk's political comments and DOGE cutbacks, but rather buyers delaying Model Y purchases.

data.title: Canada's Next PM Mark Carney Vows To Win Trade War With Trump: 'Americans Should Make No Mistake'
data.description: Mark Carney has won the Liberal Party leadership race to succeed Justin Trudeau as Canada's prime minister.

data.title: China Hits Canada With Retaliatory Tariffs On Agriculture Goods Amid Intensifying Global Trade War
data.description: China has announced retaliatory tariffs on certain Canadian agricultural products in response to Canada's import duties on Chinese electric vehicles, steel, and aluminum products.

data.title: Mark Zuckerberg's Meta Platforms A Lucrative Bet As 'Investors Favor Less Leveraged Tech Stocks,' Says Expert Amid Mag7's 2025 Underperformance
data.description: Meta Platforms is preferred by investors as it is "less leveraged," as compared to the other 'Magnificent 7' stocks, explains an analyst.
